title: Add RuleName and Extent to JUnit XML output
description: Implement issue #13: add RuleName and Extent fields from PSSA DiagnosticRecord to JUnit XML failure output. Modify 3 source files (ConvertTo-PSSAJunitXml.ps1, ConvertTo-JunitXml.ps1, Get-TestCaseXml.ps1) and update tests per specs/issue-13-add-rulename.md. Acceptance: all unit and integration tests pass, XML output contains RULE: and Extent: lines.

title: GitHub Actions CI/CD: auto-version, tag, publish to PSGallery
description: Implement issue #15: Replace Azure Pipelines with GitHub Actions release workflow. (1) Replace standard-version with commit-and-tag-version in package.json. (2) Create .github/workflows/release.yml that runs Pester tests, bumps version via commit-and-tag-version, updates PSSAToJunit.psd1 ModuleVersion, pushes tag, publishes to PSGallery using PS_GALLERY_API_KEY secret, creates GitHub Release. Guard against infinite loops (skip chore(release) commits). (3) Delete .azure-pipelines.yml and .ci/ directory. (4) Update README.md to reference GitHub Actions. See GitHub issue #15 for full acceptance criteria. DO NOT merge to main — leave on feature branch for human review.
closeReason: Implemented GitHub Actions CI/CD (issue #15): replaced Azure Pipelines with GitHub Actions release workflow, swapped standard-version for commit-and-tag-version, created release.yml with Pester tests + version bump + PSGallery publish + GitHub Release, deleted .azure-pipelines.yml and .ci/ directory, updated README with GitHub Actions example.
